scripts.start: NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME=127.0.0.1 EXPO_OFFLINE=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 EXPO_NO_REDIRECT_PAGE=1 EXPO_NO_METRO_WORKSPACE_ROOT=1 expo start --localhost
scripts.android: NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME=127.0.0.1 EXPO_OFFLINE=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 EXPO_NO_REDIRECT_PAGE=1 EXPO_NO_METRO_WORKSPACE_ROOT=1 expo start --localhost --android
scripts.ios: NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME=127.0.0.1 EXPO_OFFLINE=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 EXPO_NO_REDIRECT_PAGE=1 EXPO_NO_METRO_WORKSPACE_ROOT=1 expo start --localhost --ios
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm run test:security && expo-doctor && expo export --platform android --output-dir dist-release-check/android && expo export --platform ios --output-dir dist-release-check/ios
